hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // ""' | { read file_path; if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '(\.env|\.env\..*)$'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "BLOCKED: Reading .env files is not allowed. Access environment variables only through app/core/config.py"}' && exit 2; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // ""' | { read file_path; if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '^\.github/workflows/'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "BLOCKED: Modifying CI/CD workflow files (.github/workflows/) is not allowed."}' >&2; exit 2; fi; }
[ "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" != "main" ] || { echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "BLOCKED: Cannot edit files on the main branch. Switch to a feature branch first."}' >&2; exit 2; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git\s+push\s+.*main|git\s+push\s+origin\s+main'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "BLOCKED: Pushing to main is not allowed. Open a PR instead."}' >&2; exit 2; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'cat\s+\.env|less\s+\.env|head\s+\.env|tail\s+\.env|source\s+\.env|export\s+.*\$\(cat\s+\.env'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "BLOCKED: Reading .env files via shell is not allowed. Access environment variables only through app/core/config.py"}' >&2; exit 2; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'gh\s+pr\s+merge|gh\s+pr\s+review\s+--approve'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "BLOCKED: Approving or merging PRs is not allowed. Only open PRs."}' >&2; exit 2; fi; }
